name: megasthenes-cli
description: Terminal CLI for megasthenes — ask natural-language questions about any GitHub or GitLab repository and get a markdown-rendered, source-cited answer.
author: Kiran Gangadharan <bills@nilenso.com>

scripts.build: bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target node --format esm --minify
scripts.check:publishable: node -e "const d=require('./package.json').dependencies['@nilenso/megasthenes']; if(d.startsWith('file:')||d.startsWith('link:')){console.error('refusing to publish: @nilenso/megasthenes is still a local dep ('+d+'). Bump it to a published JSR version first.');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run check:publishable && bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build
